detail.description:
Welcome to our monster-catching survival and crafting simulation game. Embark on an epic adventure in a world filled with mysterious and powerful creatures known as Palmon!




[Capture and fight]
Capture different Palmon and discover their hidden abilities. Beware—rare Palmon offer greater rewards, but also pose a greater threat. Are you ready to take on fantastic challenges and become the ultimate Palmon master?




[Build your own homestead]
Collect Palmon and harness their powers to start fi
detail.releaseNotes: Enhanced game stability and performance optimizations.
